name: CytomX Therapeutics, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview We are a clinical-stage, oncology-focused biopharmaceutical company dedicated to developing innovative therapies to address major unmet need in oncology. CytomX has led the field of conditionally activated, masked biologics through the development of its PROBODY technology platform. This versatile, multi-modality platform is built on a strong foundation of tumor biology expertise, including deep knowledge of tumor-associated enzymes known as proteases.
